_source: docs/byzantine_notation_for_slm.md — 'Mode snapshot' table (§ Mode and Scale Rules)
_note: Maps the canonical mode label (as emitted by norm_mode in build_neume_tasks.py) to its Byzantine genus. Genus determines the microtonal comma pattern (see comma tables in the same doc). This preserves microtonal INTENT symbolically; it does not give exact frequencies. 'grave' (Varys) has multiple forms — enharmonic is the common default, marked uncertain.
